evals.prompt: 帮我监控所有 staking 相关的事件，实时显示
evals.expected_output: Agent connects to wss://api.awp.network/ws/live, subscribes to staking preset (Deposited, Withdrawn, PositionIncreased, Allocated, Deallocated, Reallocated), formats with $ emoji and human-readable amounts

evals.prompt: 我想在每次 epoch 结算时收到通知，显示 top 收益地址
evals.expected_output: Agent subscribes to EpochSettled + RecipientAWPDistributed + DAOMatchDistributed, accumulates per-recipient amounts, displays settlement summary with DAO match and top recipients. Has polling fallback.
